# Pedro Fonseca

> Front end developer, sports illustrator (PEDRO26), and tech teacher based in Portugal.

## About

Pedro Fonseca is a senior front end developer with consulting experience for clients world-wide. He specializes in React, TypeScript, and Next.js. He has worked with companies including Futurice, KWAN, and Deloitte on projects spanning energy, automotive, cybersecurity, procurement, and professional cycling.

He is also the founder of PEDRO26, a sports illustration brand with 700+ clients worldwide, who has taught as a teacher and mentor in the Portuguese tech community.

## Links

- Portfolio: https://pedrofonseca.dev
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/pedromlfonseca
- GitHub: https://github.com/PMLF
- Illustration brand: https://pedro26.pt
- Email: pedro@pedro26.pt

## Skills

- Front end: React, TypeScript, Next.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS
- Tools: Git, Figma, Adobe Illustrator, Procreate
- Languages: Portuguese (native), English (fluent)
